# Mani Ratan Singh

> Personal directory, digital archive, and engineering notebook of Mani Ratan Singh.

## About

I am a tech generalist and photographer based in India. I build hardware controllers, manage homelab configurations, and document my thoughts and work.

## Projects

- [Ayodhya Phaco Center Website](/projects/ayodhya-phaco-center/): Official static website repository for the Ayodhya Phaco Center clinic.
- [ESP8266 Smart LED Matrix Clock](/projects/wificlock/): An ESP8266 smart clock utilizing a MAX7219 LED matrix, weather, and NTP sync.
- [GPS Clock & Telemetry Dashboard](/projects/gpsclock/): A dual-display Arduino GPS Clock with MAX7219 and SSD1306 OLED telemetry readout.
- [Jellyfin Liquid Glass Theme](/projects/jellyfin-liquid-glass/): A modern glassmorphism custom stylesheet for Jellyfin web client.
- [Law Exam Batch Processor](/projects/law-exam-batch-processor/): A self-hosted legal-tech pipeline utilizing Flask, Ollama, and SearXNG.
- [RP2040 OLED Macro Pad (Wi-Fi Edition)](/projects/rp2040-oled-macropad/): A 16-key USB macro pad built with CircuitPython, OLED, and Wi-Fi.
- [Water Tank Level Monitor (ESP8266)](/projects/water-tank/): A real-time water tank level monitor utilizing an ESP8266 and a waterproof ultrasonic sensor.

## Blog Posts

- [My First Experiment with Mac AI Clustering: 37.7 Gbps Benchmarks, MLX Hiccups, and Lessons Learned](/blog/2026-07-22-thunderbolt-4-mac-ai-cluster-benchmarks/): A beginner's first hands-on test connecting an M4 Mac mini and MacBook Air over Thunderbolt 4, testing speeds with iperf3, and exploring distributed AI.
- [Building a High-Precision GPS Clock: Neo-6M, MAX7219, and SSD1306 OLED Telemetry](/blog/2026-07-20-building-high-precision-gps-clock/): Designing a dual-display Arduino GPS Clock with silent window I2C synchronization, split-tier 2D/3D fixes, and advanced display caching.
- [Simplifying the Water Tank Level Monitor: From Complex Frameworks to a Barebones ESP8266 Setup](/blog/2026-07-17-simplifying-water-tank-monitor/): How I took a complex, multi-file water monitoring project and stripped it down to a single-file ESP8266 WebSocket implementation.
- [AI Doesn't Need Better Scrapers. It Needs Better Websites.](/blog/2026-07-17-ai-needs-better-websites/): A thought on how websites can expose structured, read-only representations of public data designed specifically for machines.
- [ESP32-C3 Super Mini: First-Day Setup, Boot Problems, “invalid header: 0xffffffff”, and the Diagnostic Process That Solved Everything](/blog/2026-07-17-esp32c3-super-mini-setup/): Real-world notes from setting up multiple ESP32-C3 Super Mini boards using Arduino IDE on an Apple Silicon Mac.
